heading: About Angie Barton
bio:
Angie is an accounting professional with over 10 years of experience providing bookkeeping and financial support for businesses and organizations.

Based in Dryden, Ontario, ABPS supports businesses and organizations with dependable, ongoing bookkeeping services.

ABPS was built on a straightforward approach: maintaining accurate, organized, and up-to-date financial records so clients always have a clear understanding of their business.

Angie works directly with each client, maintaining consistent and reliable financial records through a structured, ongoing process. The focus is on accuracy, clarity, and keeping records current throughout the year.

ABPS works best with businesses that value accurate, organized records and take a consistent, ongoing approach to maintaining them.
credentials: Ongoing bookkeeping and financial record maintenance
Canadian tax and CRA compliance requirements
Supporting businesses and organizations with accurate and consistent financial records
Committed to accuracy, confidentiality, and professional service

values.title: Accuracy
values.description: Careful attention to detail in all financial records, ensuring accuracy and reliability, so you can have complete confidence in your financials.

values.title: Confidentiality
values.description: Your financial information is handled with the utmost discretion and professionalism at all times.

values.title: Personal Service
values.description: You work directly with Angie, ensuring consistent communication and accountability.
